content: {"analyses": [{"source_url": "https://www.semanticscholar.org/paper/bc09ad380dc91e5d14108a784c09d1455cafa3e9", "source_title": "Effects of time-restricted feeding on body weight, body composition and vital signs in low-income women with obesity: A 12-month randomized clinical trial.", "source_type": "journal_article", "source_quality": 0.7, "overall_relevance": 0.65, "year": 0, "authors": [], "venue": "", "doi": "", "atomic_facts": [{"statement": "BACKGROUND & AIMS\nTime-restricted feeding (TRF) studies usually are of short-term, involving heterogeneous populations, without a control...", "direct_quote": "BACKGROUND & AIMS\nTime-restricted feeding (TRF) studies usually are of short-term, involving heterogeneous populations, without a control group with similar energy restriction.", "fact_category": "causal_link", "relevance_score": 0.55, "confidence": 0.88, "perspective": "Scientific", "entities": []}, {"statement": "Besides, it seldom assess vital signs such as body temperature and heart rate, which may be influenced by the fasting state.", "direct_quote": "Besides, it seldom assess vital signs such as body temperature and heart rate, which may be influenced by the fasting state.", "fact_category": "causal_link", "relevance_score": 0.55, "confidence": 0.88, "perspective": "Scientific", "entities": []}, {"statement": "Effects were analyzed using an intention-to-treat approach.", "direct_quote": "Effects were analyzed using an intention-to-treat approach.", "fact_category": "causal_link", "relevance_score": 0.55, "confidence": 0.88, "perspective": "Scientific", "entities": []}], "evidence_summary": "Auto-extracted 3 facts from Effects of time-restricted feeding on body weight, body comp."}]}
